title: Extract duplicated SVG underline into reusable SectionUnderline component
close_reason: Extracted duplicated SVG underline into reusable SectionUnderline component in src/components/SectionUnderline.tsx and replaced all 3 instances in index.tsx

title: Remove dead CSS and fix broken dark mode support
close_reason: Removed all dead CSS (unused custom properties, unused utility classes like .page-wrap, .display-title, .island-shell, .feature-card, .nav-link, .site-footer, .rise-in, body::before/after decorations). Simplified styles.css to only essential rules. Added dark: Tailwind variants to all components (index.tsx, BotCard, TimelineItem, StepItem) for proper dark mode support. Added @custom-variant dark for class-based dark mode with the existing theme init script.

title: Fix page title and add proper SEO meta tags
close_reason: Fixed page title from 'TanStack Start Starter' to 'Bin Yahya Bot — Family AI Assistants'. Added proper SEO meta tags: description, og:title, og:description, og:type, twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description.

title: Add loading=lazy and width/height to images for Core Web Vitals
close_reason: Added width/height attributes to hero image (384x384) and bot avatar images (64x64). Added loading=lazy to bot avatar images (below the fold). Hero image kept eager since it's above the fold.

title: Remove dark mode styles from all components
close_reason: Removed all dark: Tailwind classes from index.tsx, BotCard, TimelineItem, StepItem. Removed @custom-variant dark from styles.css. Removed theme init script and suppressHydrationWarning from __root.tsx.
